untranslatable_reason: Pattern requires detection of parallel trend lines and lead-in height measurement from daily low to trend line at widest part in first quarter of formation. These require custom pattern recognition logic not available in standard technical indicators. Specifically: (1) Parallel trend line identification requires slope-based trend line fitting; (2) Lead-in height calculation requires measuring vertical distance at specific formation points; (3) Target price derivation uses custom geometric calculation based on pattern structure. No combination of allowed indicators can accurately replicate this pattern's entry/exit logic without custom pattern detection.
translation_notes: Bump-and-Run Reversal Bottom is a price action pattern requiring custom chart pattern recognition. The signal depends on identifying two parallel trend lines, measuring the lead-in height (distance from daily low to upper trend line at widest point in first quarter), and using that height to calculate target prices. While a simplified proxy using Bollinger Bands breakout was attempted, it does not capture the pattern's geometric structure. Recommend implementing custom pattern detector or using fixed-range bar pattern library.
